particulars.description: By way of floating charge all the undertaking of the company and all assets whatsoever and wheresoever including stock in trade and uncalled capital but excluding any debts and associated rights relating thereto.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

persons_entitled.name: Hsbc Invoice Finance (UK) LTD ("the Security Holder")

classification.description: Fixed charge on purchased debts which fail to vest

particulars.description: By way of fixed equitable charge all debts purchased or purported to be purchased by the security holder pursuant to an agreement for the purchase of debts between the security holder and the company (including associated rights relating thereto) which fail to vest effectively or absolutely in the security holder for any reason.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever under the terms of the aforementioned instrument creating or evidencing the charge

persons_entitled.name: Hsbc Invoice Finance (UK) LTD ("the Security Holder")
